info.title: GigKraft API
info.description: GigKraft backend API (MVP, Phase 1: integrations mocked).

get.description: Liveness check; also reports which integrations are mocked.

post.description: Email/password registration (any role; primary path for node managers).
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.

Request a phone OTP (pros/homeowners).

MOCK (Phase 1): with MOCK_TWILIO=true the code is deterministic and
returned in `dev_code` so local clients can complete the flow.
Verify a phone OTP and sign in (creates the user on first login).

Google sign-in for node managers.

MOCK (Phase 1): with MOCK_GOOGLE_OAUTH=true the id_token must be
"mock-google:<email>" and is validated deterministically.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile (JWT-protected sample).

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's name fields.

get.description: Discovery / B2B search (1.13). Filters by node, trade and ZIP.

post.description: Publish the Kraft. Requires ≥1 After photo + confirmed invoice. Sets status PENDING for node manager review.

get.description: Public: return the verified Krafts for a pro (shown on public profile).
Role-aware list: pros see their leads, homeowners see theirs.

post.description:
Homeowner requests a quote from a pro (screen 2.2 footer).

Sets respond_by = created_at + pro.response_hours (the SLA timer).

get.description: Poll endpoint: pass ?since=<last message id> for increments.

post.description: Pro sends a quote (or invoice) into the chat (screen 1.10).
Pro marks the job complete -> lead won (screen 1.10 quick action).

get.description: Open (unclaimed) broadcasts a pro can claim.
Poll endpoint for the success state (claim list updates).

post.description: First pro to claim wins: opens a Lead + chat, sets claimed_by.
Pro sends a magic review link to a past client (screen 1.7).

get.description: Public: load the review screen context from a magic link (2.5).

post.description: Public: submit stars + text + optional photos via the magic link.

get.description:
Pro's own recommendations; ?status=submitted for the moderation
queue (screen 1.8).

post.description: Pro approves -> the recommendation goes public on the profile.

get.description: Return approved recommendations for a pro's public profile.
Past leads/quotes with invoice amounts (screen 2.6 'Past jobs').

post.description: SMS-pin: mark the emergency as manually routed (removes from queue).
WhatsApp blast: re-dispatch the broadcast to eligible pros (mock).

get.description: Render a template with a specific vendor's variables.

post.description:
Log that an outreach was sent.

- Sets vendor.last_contact_date to today.
- Optionally advances vendor status from 'new' → 'contacted'.

ServiceAreaIn.description: Service area (screen 1.2): ZIP list + radius only, no map.
ServiceAreaIn.title: ServiceAreaIn
